data.intent: Turn the Arcade mockup into the real Carter's Arcade: Vite + vanilla TS static MPA with 12 playable games (6 hub cartridges, 6 cabinets) on the click-to-wake cartridge model, deployed on Vercel at arcade.cartercripe.com

data.summary: Vite MPA scaffold: package.json, vite.config.ts (9 inputs), strict tsconfig, Vitest; removed pyproject.toml/.python-version; node-safe .gitignore; lockfile committed
Full mockup CSS ported into tokens/base/arcade/fonts layers; Fontsource fonts wired; src/styles complete and freezable
storage.ts with tolerant reads + validator hook; 8 specs green (corrupt JSON fallback, clearAll arcade:* scoping)
audio.ts (lazy AudioContext beep synth + persisted arcade:sound toggle) and screen.ts (low-res pixelated canvas, integer-DPR backing store)
loop.ts fixed-timestep accumulator (60Hz update, rAF render, delta clamp); deterministic-step specs green
input.ts gestures (tap/swipe/long-press, pointer events, touch-action-based scroll discrimination); classifySwipe unit-tested
hub.ts + cartridge.ts: typed port of mockup Hub with full key-routing invariant, CSS fullscreen, alwaysOn exemption, aria-live announcements
card.ts (gcard DOM incl. veil/LED/fs-btn/stats/aria-live status) and cabinet.ts (header, SND, back-to-hub, legend scaffold)
Sprite pipeline: maps.ts (4 sprites decoded from mockup SVGs), gen-sprites.ts RLE generator, committed generated.ts, npm run sprites; 5 specs green
Demo cartridge page live at /demo/ exercising full wake/sleep/veil/fullscreen/key-routing contract; headless checks green; real-browser+touch checklist flagged for Builder
vercel.json (static vite build) + deferred insights tag in all 9 HTML entries; project creation/preview verification/analytics enablement left to Builder (CLI unauthenticated)
Reflect complete: specs synced (tech-design Foundation Reflect Notes, approach acceptance annotations), code review applied; awaiting Builder approval to merge

Foundation complete: Vite MPA scaffold (9 entries, TS strict, Vitest, zero runtime deps), full Light Film Room + pixel-layer CSS system (frozen), src/lib runtime (storage/audio/screen/loop/input/cartridge/hub with the key-routing invariant), card+cabinet UI scaffolds, sprite pipeline (maps→committed generated.ts via npm run sprites), throwaway /demo/ cartridge proving the wake/sleep/veil/fullscreen/key-routing contract, vercel.json + Web Analytics tags.
data.canon_entry: src/lib is the frozen runtime contract: Hub singleton owns all document-level input and preventDefault (Esc→exitFs|sleep, unmodified F→CSS fullscreen, claimed keys→onKey, unclaimed nav keys swallowed only while awake); storage is arcade:-prefixed tolerant JSON; fullscreen is a CSS takeover (.fs + body.has-fs); sprites are ASCII maps RLE-encoded to crispEdges SVG at build time; fixed-timestep loop decouples game speed from refresh rate.
data.notes_for_evaluator: Verified headlessly: npm run build (all 9 pages emit; demo JS 5.9KB gz), tsc --noEmit, 21 vitest specs (storage corrupt-JSON fallback + clearAll scoping, loop deterministic stepping + delta clamp, swipe classifier, sprite pipeline sync/palette/RLE), preview serves 200 on all 9 routes, npm run sprites idempotent. NOT verified (no browser/device/Vercel auth in env — Builder to do): real-browser key-routing checklist on /demo/, touch smoke test, Vercel project creation + preview URL + Web Analytics enablement (repo side done: vercel.json + insights tags in all entries). Deviations recorded in tech-design Foundation Reflect Notes (toolchain versions vite8/ts7/vitest4, storage.get validator param, arcade:sound vs mockup arcade:snd, .gcard--always-on class, touch-action-based swipe discrimination, sprite maps recovered from mockup SVGs since build.py is absent). No merges performed; feat/foundation pushed and awaiting Builder approval.

data.intent: Scaffold, shared runtime (hub/cartridge, storage, audio, input, loop, screen), styles, sprite pipeline, card/cabinet scaffolds, Vercel deploy config
Action cabinets: Snake, Bricks, Aim Trainer on the shared cabinet scaffold; owns cabinet-entry.ts; flips their hub cards LIVE (stacked on feat/launch per Builder-directed sequencing)

data.intent: Full hub page (header, ticker, grids, scoreboard, legend) + six hub cartridges: port Dino Run, 2048, Token Miner; build Simon, Memory, Lights Out; style-guide page

data.summary: Hub page structure + chrome: static index.html (13 SOON cabinets), hub.ts chrome wiring, ticker.ts, 4 additive sprites
Dino Run ported onto foundation runtime: createLoop 60Hz, canvas pointerdown jump, best:dino persisted, card stats + flash
2048 ported: pure logic.ts (12 specs), swipe+keys UI, board/best persistence, NO MOVES LEFT overlay
Token Miner ported: alwaysOn cartridge, tested offline math (4h cap, negative-delta clamp), miner:state persistence, away toast
Simon built: 2x2 palette pads, tone+flash sequence playback, best streak persisted, no key claims (mouse game)
Memory built: 4x4 grid of 8 pipeline-sprite pairs, fewest-moves best persisted, mismatch timer settled on sleep
Lights Out built: tested press/generate logic (solvable by replay), 5x5 UI, fewest-moves best
Scoreboard live updates (2s), inline YES/NO reset flow with per-game hooks, /style-guide page with pipeline-rendered sprite sheet
Key-routing checklist: static audit clean (hub.ts sole document listener/preventDefault owner; mouse games claim no keys); headless checks green; browser/touch/visual items left MANUAL for Builder
Reflect done: tech-design/ux/approach synced; code review clean (2 advisories deferred to launch a11y)

Full hub page + six hub cartridges: Dino Run, 2048, Token Miner ported at mockup parity; Simon, Memory, Lights Out built new; live scoreboard + inline reset flow + /style-guide; 29 new unit tests (50 total green)
data.canon_entry: Hub page (index.html + src/pages/hub.ts) with six cartridges under src/games/{dino,g2048,miner,simon,memory,lightsout}; scoreboard/ticker UI modules; game-owned CSS pattern for post-freeze styles; 8-sprite pipeline set
data.notes_for_evaluator: 3 acceptance criteria verified headlessly (mockup-parity persistence, logic tests, reset scoping); 3 need Builder browser pass (end-to-end wake/sleep behavior, key-routing in real browser, visual side-by-side). Hub JS 6.6 kB gz vs 100 kB budget.

data.intent: Launch partition (Builder-rescoped: runs BEFORE cabinets): a11y pass + fixes, payload audit, naming double-check (Simon), README game guide; cabinet-dependent items (LIVE flips, cabinet bests) deferred to post-cabinets; domain cutover + analytics verify remain Builder-manual

Launch Reflect done (pre-cabinets run): specs synced, criteria annotated; awaiting Builder for manual checks + merges

Deferred: LIVE flips + cabinet stats (need cabinets). Manual: browser checklists, Vercel dashboard + domain.
